nasb.text: Also they will make themselves bald for you And gird themselves with sackcloth; And they will weep for you in bitterness of soul With bitter mourning.

esv.text: they make themselves bald for you and put sackcloth on their waist, and they weep over you in bitterness of soul, with bitter mourning.

cnv.text: 他們必因你把頭剃光， 腰束麻布， 為你痛心哭泣， 苦苦悲哀。

ccb.text: 又为你剃头披麻， 悲痛哀伤。
